title: clerodendrum paniculatum
intro: Clerodendrum paniculatum, also known as the glory bower or Florida glory bower, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fever, and cough, as well as acting as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum paniculatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to aid in the treatment of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
